privileged_info_summary: Task requires creating a complete engineering drawing package (4 orthographic and isometric views minimum, 6 dimension annotations) from a T8 lead screw housing bracket model using FreeCAD's TechDraw workbench. The T8 lead screw housing bracket is a real mechanical component used in 3D printers, CNC routers, and linear motion systems worldwide. However, despite README claims, the specific FreeCAD file 'T8_housing_bracket.FCStd' cannot be verified to exist in the official FreeCAD-library repository (no T8/lead screw housing category exists in the library's Mechanical Parts folder structure), indicating the file is synthetic. Task requires minimum 4 views (contradicting metadata value of 3), exactly 6 dimensions, PDF export >5KB, and saving to specific output paths.
